YOKA-TOXEMIA.title: Toxemia
YOKA-TOXEMIA.description:
Start each combat with [blue]{ThornsPower}[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold].
At the end of combat, heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
YOKA-TOXEMIA.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
YOKA-BLOOD_EAGLE.title: Blood Eagle
YOKA-BLOOD_EAGLE.description: Whenever you lose Gold, Heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
YOKA-BLOOD_EAGLE.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
YOKA-INFERNAL_PLASMA.title: Infernal Plasma
YOKA-INFERNAL_PLASMA.description: The first time you lose HP during an event, raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
YOKA-INFERNAL_PLASMA.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
YOKA-THORNY_HELMET.title: Thorny Helmet
YOKA-THORNY_HELMET.description: Your [gold]Temporary Thorns[/gold] reduce by [blue]{TemporaryThornsPower}[/blue] instead of disappearing at the end of your turn.
YOKA-THORNY_HELMET.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
YOKA-SYMBIOSIS.title: Symbiosis
YOKA-SYMBIOSIS.description:
At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{SymbiosisPower}[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold].
At the end of combat, heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
YOKA-SYMBIOSIS.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
YOKA-ARCHAIC_CHISEL.title: Archaic Chisel
YOKA-ARCHAIC_CHISEL.description: Whenever you [gold]Smith[/gold], [gold]Enchant[/gold] a random card with a [purple]random enchantment[/purple].
YOKA-ARCHAIC_CHISEL.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
